tasks.subject: Restructure into monorepo workspace
tasks.description: Restructure the repository into a pnpm monorepo workspace with two packages: `packages/cli-tools` (system setup, SSH, session manager) and `packages/pi-extension` (Pi extension and skills).

tasks.subject: Build interactive CLI setup wizard
tasks.description: Create a modern, interactive CLI setup wizard in the `cli-tools` package using `@clack/prompts` and `commander` to replace the old `install.sh` bash script.

tasks.subject: Refactor Pi extension package
tasks.description: Update the Pi extension package (`pi-1password`) to depend on the CLI tools package, ensuring it only contains Pi-specific code (extensions and skills).

tasks.subject: Create documentation for NPM tokens and examples
tasks.description: Write a guide (e.g., `docs/EXAMPLES.md`) explaining how to set up and use npm Automation Tokens and other example API keys with 1Password and this toolset.
